title: 7. Console BDD specs
description: Add Gherkin specs and Cucumber.js + Playwright harness for console UI. Integrate into CI and exclude console scenarios from Python/Rust runners.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added Cucumber.js + Playwright harness with console fixtures, UI steps, and features/console specs. Updated CI to run console UI specs and excluded @console from Python/Rust parity and runners.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: features/console specs implemented; console BDD runs in CI; Python/Rust suites skip console-tagged scenarios; spec parity ignores console-tagged scenarios.
